mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate breaches 4.5%, labor market slack triggers recession fears that suppress corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of instances where UNRATE crosses 4.5%, or signal loses predictive power with p-value above 0.1 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust demand without overheating, which supports equity valuations and generates positive forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative returns in greater than 50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance with p-value above 0.05 in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals improving supply-side capacity utilization, which boosts short-term market sentiment and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during post-shock recovery periods, or 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with INDPRO momentum across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in housing starts reflects collapsing construction demand and tightening credit conditions, which forecasts negative equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than 55% of triggered months, or the housing signal fails to predict returns when FEDFUNDS is below 3%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market that supports consumer spending and drives positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative returns in greater than 50% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price inflation forces markets to price in tighter monetary policy and lower real earnings, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of high-inflation months, or the inflation signal shows zero predictive power across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic strength, which sustains corporate profit growth and produces positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive returns during mid-cycle expansions, or the joint GDP-retail sales predictor loses significance in out-of-sample validation.
